'''sashuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:gradable|gradable]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gradable|gradable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sashuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshikith|sæshikith]] || [[word:sæshikij|sæshikij]] || [[word:sæshikish|sæshikish]] || [[word:sæshiki|sæshiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashushukuth|sashushukuth]] || [[word:sashushukuj|sashushukuj]] || [[word:sashushukush|sashushukush]] || [[word:sashushuku|sashushuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashukuth|sashukuth]] || [[word:sashukuj|sashukuj]] || [[word:sashukush|sashukush]] || [[word:sashuku|sashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashufkuth|sashufkuth]] || [[word:sashufkuj|sashufkuj]] || [[word:sashufkush|sashufkush]] || [[word:sashufkuf|sashufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashukuthu|sashukuthu]] || [[word:sashukuju|sashukuju]] || [[word:sashukushu|sashukushu]] || [[word:sashukuku|sashukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashukuth|sashukuth]] || [[word:sashukuj|sashukuj]] || [[word:sashukush|sashukush]] || [[word:sashuku|sashuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashukuthul|sashukuthul]] || [[word:sashukujul|sashukujul]] || [[word:sashukushul|sashukushul]] || [[word:sashukukul|sashukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashukuthuthu|sashukuthuthu]] || [[word:sashukujuju|sashukujuju]] || [[word:sashukushushu|sashukushushu]] || [[word:sashukuku|sashukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashukuthun|sashukuthun]] || [[word:sashukujun|sashukujun]] || [[word:sashukushun|sashukushun]] || [[word:sashukukun|sashukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashukuthuoro|sashukuthuoro]] || [[word:sashukujuoro|sashukujuoro]] || [[word:sashukushuoro|sashukushuoro]] || [[word:sashukukuoro|sashukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
